releaseNotes:
## 更新日志 / Changelog v1.3.1

### ✨ 新功能 / New Features
* 🌐 **新增 Web 模式传输音频** - 支持通过浏览器进行音频传输，提供更灵活的使用方式 (#220)
    + **Added Web mode audio transmission** - Supports audio transmission through browser for more flexible usage (#220)
* 🎵 **高级音频处理参数与频谱可视化** - 实现高级音频处理参数调节和实时频谱可视化功能
    + **Advanced audio processing parameters and spectrum visualization** - Implemented advanced audio parameter adjustments and real-time spectrum visualization
* 🎚️ **新增10段均衡器音频效果** - 提供专业级10段均衡器，支持精细调节音频频段
    + **Added 10-band equalizer audio effect** - Provides professional-grade 10-band equalizer for fine-tuning audio frequency bands
* 🔧 **新增FEC前向纠错与抖动缓冲** - 实现FEC前向纠错和抖动缓冲音频优化，提升网络传输稳定性
    + **Added FEC forward error correction and jitter buffer** - Implemented FEC and jitter buffer audio optimization for improved network stability
* 📦 **新增抖动缓冲与FEC/PLC音频丢包恢复** - 完善音频丢包恢复机制，显著减少音频卡顿和中断
    + **Added jitter buffer with FEC/PLC audio packet loss recovery** - Enhanced audio packet loss recovery mechanism to significantly reduce audio stuttering and interruptions

### 🛠️ 优化与重构 / Improvements & Refactoring
* 🖥️ **重构Web UI** - 使用Alpine.js重构Web界面，提供更强的前端交互能力 (#222)
    + **Refactored Web UI** - Rebuilt web interface using Alpine.js for enhanced frontend interactivity (#222)
* 🎨 **优化WebUI设计** - 改进Web界面视觉设计和用户体验
    + **Optimized WebUI design** - Improved web interface visual design and user experience
* 🎧 **重构音频传输与处理逻辑** - 优化音频处理流程，移除冗余组件，提升性能
    + **Refactored audio transmission and processing logic** - Optimized audio processing pipeline and removed redundant components for better performance
* 🔌 **重构adb反向端口相关代码** - 优化桌面端音频停止逻辑和端口管理
    + **Refactored adb reverse port related code** - Optimized desktop audio stop logic and port management
* ⚙️ **调整连接配置UI和端口逻辑** - 改进连接配置界面和端口处理方式
    + **Adjusted connection configuration UI and port logic** - Improved connection configuration interface and port handling
* 🔊 **调整音频引擎参数** - 优化音频引擎参数配置并替换滚动事件处理
    + **Adjusted audio engine parameters** - Optimized audio engine parameter configuration and replaced scroll event handling
* 📊 **优化音频处理与UDP日志逻辑** - 改进音频处理流程和UDP日志记录
    + **Optimized audio processing and UDP log logic** - Improved audio processing flow and UDP logging
* 🎼 **更新均衡器预设并增强交互体验** - 优化均衡器预设配置，提升用户交互体验
    + **Updated equalizer presets and enhanced interaction experience** - Optimized equalizer preset configurations for improved user interaction
* 🍎 **改进macOS界面及相关文档** - 优化macOS平台界面和使用文档 (#210)
    + **Improved macOS interface and related documentation** - Optimized macOS platform interface and usage documentation (#210)

### 🐛 问题修复 / Bug Fixes
* 🔌 **修复网络切换后UDP无限重传问题** - 解决网络切换后UDP无限重传导致WAN上行流量泄漏的问题 (#214)
    + **Fixed UDP infinite retransmission after network switch** - Resolved issue where UDP infinite retransmission caused WAN uplink traffic leakage after network switch (#214)
* 📶 **修复UDP高频丢包与卡顿问题** - 解决UDP传输过程中的高频丢包和音频卡顿现象
    + **Fixed UDP high-frequency packet loss and stuttering** - Resolved high-frequency packet loss and audio stuttering during UDP transmission
* 📝 **修复文本框焦点问题** - 修复文本输入框焦点异常的问题
    + **Fixed text field focus issue** - Fixed abnormal focus behavior in text input fields
* 💥 **修复Linux退出时应用崩溃问题** - 解决Linux平台退出应用时崩溃及wpctl set-default执行失败的问题
    + **Fixed Linux application crash on exit** - Resolved application crash and wpctl set-default execution failure when exiting on Linux platform

### 🔧 其他变更 / Other Changes
* 🚫 **移除蓝牙支持及相关代码** - 移除蓝牙连接相关功能和代码 (#212)
    + **Removed Bluetooth support and related code** - Removed Bluetooth connection functionality and related code (#212)
* 📁 **数据目录迁移至平台标准路径** - 将应用数据目录迁移到平台标准路径，提升兼容性
    + **Migrated data directory to platform standard path** - Moved application data directory to platform standard path for better compatibility
* 🌍 **补全VB-Cable相关字符串的多语言本地化** - 完善VB-Cable相关字符串的多语言翻译 (#207)
    + **Completed multi-language localization for VB-Cable strings** - Completed multi-language translations for VB-Cable related strings (#207)
* 📝 **文档更新与修复** - 更新防火墙放行命令、修复文档错别字、补全贡献者信息等
    + **Documentation updates and fixes** - Updated firewall rules, fixed typos, completed contributor information, etc.

### 🙏 致谢 / Credits
* 感谢 @LanRhyme @ChinsaaWei @ChouChiu @WhatDamon @raindropQwQ @Jack-Huang-2020 及所有贡献者的努力
  * Thanks to @LanRhyme, @ChinsaaWei, @ChouChiu, @WhatDamon, , @raindropQwQ, @Jack-Huang-2020 and all contributors for their efforts

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1
